title: cli:spec-update-metadata
description: Agents need a CLI command to safely update spec metadata with LLM-optimized fields. The `specd spec update-metadata <workspace:capability-path>` command accepts a partial metadata JSON/YAML and delegates to `UpdateSpecMetadata` to ensure a safe merge with deterministic fields.
context: Agents need a CLI command to safely update spec metadata with LLM-optimized fields. The `specd spec update-metadata <workspace:capability-path>` command accepts a partial metadata JSON/YAML and delegates to `UpdateSpecMetadata` to ensure a safe merge with deterministic fields.

rules: The command SHALL accept a qualified spec ID (`<workspace:capability-path>`).
The command SHALL accept a partial metadata payload from stdin or a file via the `--file` flag. This payload SHALL be validated to ensure it only contains allowed fields for an update.
The command SHALL delegate to the `UpdateSpecMetadata` use case.

scenarios.name: Rejects missing spec ID
when: specd spec update-metadata is run without arguments

scenarios.name: Reads from stdin
when: echo 'optimizedDescription: "test"' | specd spec update-metadata core:config is run
then: it parses the YAML from stdin successfully

scenarios.name: Reads from --file
when: specd spec update-metadata core:config --file payload.yaml is run

scenarios.name: Invokes use case
when: a valid partial payload is provided
then: the command invokes UpdateSpecMetadata.execute() with the correct spec ID and payload
